statement: In every magma, Equation 1144 (`x = y * ((y * (z * w)) * w)`) implies Equation 1212 (`x = y * ((z * (w * w)) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0663
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op z w)) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op w w)) x))
